title: Life Changing
author: Peter Marone
body:
I saw the ads. I thought there's no way - omeprazole can barely handle my reflex. I've had reflux for as long as I can remember (decades now), regardless of weight, fitness, activity levels, etc. Prior to omeprazole, I was a calcium tablet addict, going through several "max" strength bottles in a week. So how can an orangey, burpy pill fix it. 

But, I wanted to get rid of the daily need for omeprazole, so I gambled and bought a bottle. 

I took one pill every day for the first week with my omeprazole. 

1 took one pill every day for the second week with omeprazole every other day.

I took one pill every day for the third week. No omeprazole.

By this time, I was getting a funky/orangey acidy feel in the evening shortly after taking the pill, but I was able to sleep through the night with no reflux at all. 

By the next week, the funky feeling was gone, and I purchased a subscription.

I don't even get the orangey burps any longer. 

It's been five weeks without omeprazole now. I sleep throughout the night with zero acid / reflux issues. I have no acid issues throughout the day. 
I'll probably experiment with changing up dosing at some point - maybe try every other day, but for now I'll stick with a daily pill.

title: complete relief after years of suffering.
author: Jana
body:
I was prescribed omeprazole for severe acid reflux about 10 years ago. I have tried to go off it many times, and succeeded occasionally, only to have to go back on it. even at a double dose, it didn't seem to be working well, and I hated the idea of being on it long term. 

 I'm halfway through my 14-day dose of Orange Burps, but I experienced near-immediate relief from the very first dose. I had been tapering off omeprazole and taking Orange Burps made the usually painful transition off of PPI's almost painless.

I took my first few doses with meals, and used only one capsule with food to ramp up. After a couple of days, I started taking 2 capsules on an empty stomach in the morning. I had no stomach irritation or nausea, and within 3 days I was noticing a sharp change in my digestion and reduced heartburn symptoms. It is actually amazing. I feel good again, and am starting to see an increase in energy, even to waking up with more natural energy and having better quality sleep. I can't wait to finish the two-week cycle and see what happens after!

I'm actually shocked. I've tried supplements and solutions to get off PPIs and nothing has worked. Doctors had zero advice, except that PPIs were the only path to protect my esophagus and stomach from reflux.

I rarely write reviews, unless the product is actually working. It's surreal to say this has hopefully changed everything for me.

Even though I was skeptical, I ordered some (this was like three years ago) and after a few weeks the acid reflux went away. I really did not change anything in my life style. I still drink coffee in the morning and wine and beers in the evening. I eat spicy food and pasta with red sauce. Occasionally, I will feel like something is coming on and I just double down on the dosage and it goes away.

I have doing this for three years and if I start to run out of OB before the new order arrives, panic starts to set in.

Changed my life and it might do the same for you.

Then, yesterday, I took a step down and took my OB pill with a 20 mg OTC Nexium pill to see how I felt with that. I felt fine all day. I'll do this for a couple of weeks or more; and then I'll take the BIG step down by dropping the OTC 20mg Nexium altogether and just see how I feel with only the OB pills. To get off the Nexium finally would be just fine with me.

title: Miracle
author: Anonymous
body: I have been taking a nightly dose of prescription antacid pills for over 15 years. If I miss a dose, I am awakened in the middle of the night to that horrible feeling of a heart attack due to severe acid reflux. (GERD) Two weeks ago I began taking orange burps, which are actually small enough for me to swallow and not have pushed back up by acid; and I kid you not, I haven’t once taken my acid pills. I haven’t once been awakened by that horrible ‘heart attack’ burning in my chest. I tried another brand of orange peel pills about a year ago and they were so large, I couldn’t get them down. I eat a lot of spicy food, have coffee everyday and I am just truly amazed by these little orange miracle in a bottle pills. I have read over and over about how PPIs and antacids are known to cause stomach cancer and esophageal cancer and am so happy to say, I am off of them for good. I will definitely be a life long customer. And yes, you do have orange burps, sort of like when you burp after drink an orange flavored soft drink. If you want to get off of your cancer causing pills, try these. I also believe I read at one point when researching, d-limomene that it is full of immune boosting vitamin C, as well as helping with sleep, curbing appetite, calming anxiety among others! I take this after dinner, to ensure I have a god night’s sleep.

title: Mysteriously Effective
author: William Stover
body:
Prior to orange burps, I had frequent indigestion - taking some sort of antacid or preventative 4-5 times per week. I had to make sure I didn't eat less than 3-4 hours before bed time, and spicy feeds were anathema.

The effectiveness of Orange Burps is mysterious to me because within about 2 months of discovering them, I also left my road warrior job (eating out daily), which precipitated a change in my diet - mostly just eating less and less spicy. 

Now I'm taking medication maybe once every couple of weeks or more, and it's preventative ( mexican food), rarely reactive. I take the orange burps every other day after the two week initiation period. Indigestion and reflux has become something I rarely think about.

I'm sold, and just placed my second order. I do not think that the change in life style was dramatic enough to explain the difference. I'm convinced that the Orange Burps have made a huge difference!

author: Anonymous
body: Wow. This product is literally a life saver. In late April, I suddenly developed heart burn. I've NEVER had heartburn. I do have anxiety though, and easily get stressed out with usually over committing myself. So, with constant heartburn and drinking mylanta ALL day- my stress level was even higher wondering what the heck was wrong with me! So, I ask my doctor if I could start Prilosec. Heart burn was mostly gone- but OMG I ended up with a burning stomach and was told I had developed gastritis. AWFUL. So, I went from 20mg of Prilosec to 80mg!!! It took a while, but my gastritis symptoms started to feel better ( lost 20 pounds because I could barely eat a thing). Then, all of a sudden at night I would feel acid burning in my throat. Are you kidding me? I'm taking 80 mg of Prilosec and having acid in my throat? Good God. I was pissed. So in the meantime, I am frantically searching for answers on the internet- what to do, what not to do... and LO AND BEHOLD ENTER ORANGE BURPS! I read ALL of the reviews from every seller possible. I thought- I am trying this. I read about D- Limonene and thought I had nothing to lose. I took one as I was laying in bed as the acid was eating my throat... literally 10 minutes later it was GONE. I have now gone though one bottle, have ordered 2 more and take 1-2 every day. ( Usually only 1). I am off the PPI. Which Im feeling even better without. I feel so thankful this was only a few months of figuring out, since I read many reviews saying they have dealt with GERD for many years. It's awful and I would not wish it on anyone! Orange Burps rocks. The owner, is super responsive on facebook and answered all of my questions or concerns ( which were A LOT lol). This is the real deal. Thank you for helping my anxiety over this situation and my heartburn!!!

It seems to be helping but I will reserve my full endorsement for another week or two. I also researched D-limonene in scholarly articles (I am an R.N.) and am amazed at how much research has been done and what beneficial properties this class of naturally occurring chemicals has been shown to help various disease processes in laboratory studies. And why haven't we heard about this? I fear another big Pharma cover-up.

I had been taking these drugs for almost 2 years when I learned this and found Orange Burps right at the same time. OB works just as well as these drugs, and I presume don't work as PPI's?
I had been experiencing muscle pain and stiffness every morning and that is the number one side effect of PPI's among others. I still have stiffness (I think just from life :) but nothing like when I was taking PPI's. 

Thank you Orange Burps!

title: A world of a difference!
author: Anonymous
body: I was prescribed my first PPI in 1993. It was a "miracle" at the time, relieving my GERD. Over the years, with multiple work-related moves, and several different doctors, I stayed on a PPI, with my most recent doctor doubling my dose 3.5 years ago. None of the doctors seemed concerned about the fact that I had been taking PPIs for so many (23!!!) years, and none had checked the status of my liver or Vitamin B levels. After doing my own research, I quit PPIs cold turkey (it was rough, with much discomfort, for months). Well, my GERD actually IMPROVED when I got off PPIs. But, still the heartburn & upper chest pain kept hanging on.... so I started taking Pepcid Complete once a day. And still pain. Then, I found Orange Burps! When I read about it & watched the video, it made sense to try it. I am SO glad I did! I'm still in my first bottle, taking it once a day, or sometimes every other day now. The chest pain (in my esophagus?) is gone! I don't have stomach pain when I'm hungry, I get actual hunger pangs instead - this hasn't happened for years! I sleep through the night with no discomfort, even on my stomach! No burning acid up my throat! I am eating nearly anything I like, enjoying adult beverages again, and able to bend over to do chores without suffering hours of agonizing gut pain afterwards! And, according to my lab work, my Vitamin D, which had been very depleted for the last 10 years, is finally back in the normal range. My current doctor has had me taking prescription strength Vitamin D for years, and my levels never increased until this year (PPIs did quite a number on my system, preventing me from absorbing vitamins & nutrients properly, and I didn't know until a few years ago). These little gems are amazing, making a world of difference in my life! I ordered more bottles, to keep some on hand if I need them, and to share with family & friends, so they will know about them too! THANK YOU SO MUCH for Orange Burps!

Hi William,

Everyone is a bit different. Some people are militant about taking them everyday, but for others that may be unnecessary. Some people find they can do a regimen of 20 softgels over 20 days and then they're good for several months.

title: Orange Burbs or prescription Acid Reflux Meds??
author: Kimberly M Clark
body:
With more and more studies of the side effects of long term use of acid reflux meds ie. kidney problems, dementia & bone fractures to name just a few per: https://www.webmd.com/heartburn-gerd/news/20170703/popular-heartburn-drugs-death-risk#1 ) 
and the fact that I've been taking them for over a decade, I started trying to wean myself off of them. Not to mention my doctors also wanted me off them. However, after a week off of the Pantoprazole (Nexium) the heartburn was back and I thought I was going to DIE! So back on them I went. Until I saw an ad for Orange Burbs. I decided, what the heck, why not? I started off by taking 2 twice a day and after only 3-4 days there was a huge improvement. I had quite a bit of heartburn for the first couple days but thought if I could just fight through it maybe this could work!
I'm happy to say that after 2 months the heartburn is 98% gone!! I still get it every now and then (when I over eat) but I just take another Orange Burbs and that takes care of if. I'm now only taking 1 once a day. If I'm going through an episode of more heartburn I go back to 2 or take it twice.
I have to say, I do burb a lot more than I ever did but it's Orange!! And it's actually pleasant!! I tell my husband I'm just a walking air freshener!!
I would recommend anyone who's been on acid reflux meds for an extended period of time to TRY this!! Give it at least a week or two. I am SO happy I did!

title: FINALLY!!! Relief from the pain!
author: Robin S.
body:
These are AMAZING!!! No, seriously, they are absolutely amazing!!! For a few years now, heartburn has been getting increasingly more painful and more often until I reached the point that I was having such painful heartburn, it was constantly keeping me from sleeping well -- or often preventing me from sleeping at all.

I was getting up every 30 - 40 minutes at night to drink a glass of baking soda water with ever increasing amounts of baking soda in the water.

At work, I was having to make sure that I had a glass of baking soda water handy because I never knew when the "fire" in my stomach would have to be put out.

My stomach was always on fire. My esophagus often feel like I had just had molten lava come up from my stomach.

I got to the point that I didn't want to eat and yet if I skipped a meal, the acid felt like it was eating away at my stomach.

Digestive enzymes didn't help. Enzymes with HCl didn't help -- though they should have. Medication for ulcers didn't help.

I didn't want to have to take Tagamet just so I could sleep, but I would do that once a week just so that I could get some sleep. I was getting desperate.

Then, one day I saw an Ad for Orange Burps and decided that it was worth a try because this problem was way out of control. I figured that at this point, I had nothing to lose.

My problem was so bad, it took 2 Orange Burps to put out the fire, but it worked!!! Oh, praise God, it worked!!!

After taking the second Orange Burp, every time the "fire" would appear in my stomach and my esophagus would hurt, I would burp. The pain would immediately stop in my esophagus and the fire would go out. Oh, hallelujah!!!

For the first time in a very, very long time, I was able to sleep without having to get up frequently to drink baking soda water.

I can't shout the praises about Orange Burps long enough or loud enough! I am a VERY HAPPY customer!!!!!

So I received my first bottle of orange burps this morning and I took one a couple hours after I had breakfast. I spent a few hours belching the orange flavor, which was actually kind of pleasant ,and then suddenly no more acid! Now me being the skeptic that I am, and sweets being the trigger for my reflux, when I went to lunch with the girls from work today I ate some chocolate decadence cake, no acid! I came home an ate 3 chocolates out of a box of Christmas chocolates, no acid and I'm writing this now laying on my right side in bed and no acid!! These pills are totally amazing! I will never go without them and I recommend them to anyone with heartburn or acid reflux.

title: Orange Burps was a perfect match for me.
author: Barry D.
body:
Before taking Orange Burps, I had been taking a prescription strength Proton Pump Inhibitor (PPI) called Omeprazole. I developed a kidney issue from some of my medications and was asked by my doctor to stop the Omeprazole and go back to eating foods that did not trigger my acid reflux and to elevate my head with pillows to help the reflux and take a few Tums after every meal as my remedies for the acid reflux. These remedies were mild and temporary at best.
I read a Facebook post about Orange Burps. And did a bit of research to come to the conclusion that I should at least try this. After less than a week of taking Orange Burps, I saw real results. The aftertaste in the form of a citrusy tasting 'burp' was pretty much the only side effect I experience. They're hardly noticeable now. No more Tums, no more raising the head of my bed, and no more acid reflux symptoms. My kidneys breathed a collective sigh of relief. I've been taking Orange Burps, once a day, every day after dinner for 6 - 7 months. I could not be more pleased with my results, but your results may be different. I wish you all the best with your heartburn / acid reflux. Thank you.

title: So far, so good!
author: Jeanine J.
body: I have been taking Orange Burps for about 2 1/2 weeks now. For the first week, I continued to take my Omeprazole on the ‘off’ days, when I didn’t talk the Orange Burps. I was hesitant to give it up completely, as my heartburn is severe without the Omeprazole. After a week, I quit the Omeprazole and went with just Orange Burps. To date, I’ve had one minor bout with heartburn, but it was pretty minor. It was on one of my off days, so I took one Orange Burp that day and it cleared up. Some days I have a very faint feeling of heartburn, so I may play around with my dosage a bit more, but for the most part, two pills every other day seems to work. My husband is so impressed with how these have helped me, he is ready to take them too! I’m thrilled with the prospect of finally being off those stinking prescription drugs, which I know are so bad for me to take as long as I have (about 5 years now)!

title: AMAZING SO FAR!
author: Anonymous
body: I have acid reflux/gerd and have been taking Dr. prescribed acid reflux meds for over 15 yrs! Have had terrible stomach issues but never realized that the medication for this may have been the culprit. Saw the ad for these and was thinking I would try Orange Burps and get off completely eventually from prescribed meds as to heal my stomach issues. Well, I was a sceptic but I am on DAY 3 and happy to report they are working. UNREAL! I started with taking half a tablet of my Zantac WITH 2 of the OBs. Worked like a charm. Did it the same way on day 2. NO issues. Night 3, decided to get brave and try 1/2 Zantac pill with ONE OB and was worried, but woke up with NO ACID REFLUX issues overnite!!! As I get braver, I am considering DROPPING the half zantac and relying SOLELY on the OBs to control my reflux. Am hoping I can get to just take 1 OB each nite and be done completely with the prescription! I may be able to do that now, but am toooo scared to try! If you have never felt what it is like to have the bile, acid searing the back of your throat at nite, you wont know what I am talking about......but so far, this stuff works. I dont know why it does, but it is working for me so far.

title: Amazing Product! Off Prilosec Completely!
author: Evan F.
body: Have had daily GERD for over 30 years and have been on prilosec / omeprazale 20mg per day for over 15 years to control it. Have been trying to get off this PPI for many years because of all the dangers associated with long-term use, including dementia. I even wrote a blog post about 18 months ago on the dangers of PPIs and my journey trying to get off this dangerous medication: https://www.farrlawfirm.com/dementia/caution-the-hidden-dangers-of-heartburn-medicine/. The protocol I mentioned going through in my blog post did not work. Since then I tried another natural treatment using a blend of essential oils rubbed on the outside of the throat. Didn't work. I've been taking one capsule of Orange Burps for the last two days and went cold turkey off the prilosec at the same time, and so far I am incredibly amazed b/c I've had no acid reflux at all. I even ate bacon the first day I took an Orange Burp. Bacon has always been one of my worst triggers for causing reflux, but I had none. The "repeating" burps of the orange flavor does last for several hours, but is not at all unpleasant. If this continues to work and allows me to stay off prilosec, I am going to be extremely happy and will wind up dong another blog post about this amazing product.
